challenges.name: Short-distance Walker: Level 1
challenges.description: Avoid journeys shorter than 3 km until the end of the day after you activate the challenge.
challenges.detailedDescription:
Don't take trips shorter than 3 km — you’ll help to reduce traffic levels.

If you didn’t manage to meet the target, the challenge will be reset (but you can restart it at any time).

challenges.name: Connect & explore
challenges.description: Add your car to the garage in the app and manage your Škoda online.
challenges.detailedDescription: By adding your car to the garage, you can explore more of the Škoda world, enjoy additional benefits, and complete driving-related challenges. Only primary users can take this challenge, and you need to activate it only once, via the VIN and Škoda ID.

challenges.name: Team up with a service partner
challenges.description: Choose your service partner with MyŠkoda.
challenges.detailedDescription: The service partner is a dedicated personal adviser offering assistance and expertise on any issue about your car. You can change your service partner at any time. And you can book a service quickly and easily with your MyŠkoda app.
